name: strtol
title: strtol
syntax: int strtol(char s[], long& result); // form 1
int strtol(char s[], dword startIndex, long& result); // from 2
description: Converts the string s to a 32bit integer.The number base is
Whitespace (spaces or tabs) at the start of the string is ignored.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Contains the converted value after the call. The value is 0 if the string can’t be converted to a number. It is the largest possible positive/negative number in case of overflow.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: Position in s where the conversion shall begin.

return: Otherwise, returns the index of the first character after the number.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
